prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约45名、33名、42名、21名、10名，整体呈波动前移趋势（位次数字持续减小），近3年累计前移约32名；2025年基准约10名，竞争烈度逐年攀升；该校在青海省2021–2025年招生计划均为1人，2026年物理类计划仍为1人，计划人数持平，未对竞争格局产生结构性影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜参照北京大学约第2名，属全国顶尖层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年北京大学声誉评价偏负面，但作为国内最高学府之一，整体报考热度不受显著影响；抖音热度总排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量极大，持续推高关注度；临床医学（A）、基础医学（A）、口腔医学（A）、药学（A+）、护理学（A+）等均为全国顶尖水平，与招生专业临床医学（八年制本博连读）高度匹配，学科实力对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续高热（2024年，推荐），社会认可度高；本省2026年物理类考生约30672人，较2025年30457人略有增加，竞争基数小幅扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、招生计划持平、本省考生小幅增加及临床医学专业高热不退等因素，在2025年基准10名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约8名，区间5–11名。

- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 暂无（该校在青海省仅投放一个招生专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 该校在青海省仅招收临床医学（八年制本博连读）一个专业，无分档选择空间。位次在预测区间（5–11名）内可积极报考；位次明显优于区间上限（<5名）则录取把握极大；位次接近区间下限（11名）可尝试冲刺。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 45, 33, 42, 21, and 10 respectively, showing a fluctuating but overall advancing trend (ranking numbers continuously decreasing), with a cumulative advance of about 32 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 10, with competition intensity increasing year by year; the university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Province from 2021 to 2025 was 1 person each year, and the 2026 Physics Category plan remains 1 person, with the number of places unchanged, having no structural impact on the competition landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science ranking, it is approximately 2nd, referencing Peking University, belonging to the top national tier, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; in 2026, Peking University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but as one of the highest institutions in China, overall application enthusiasm is not significantly affected; Douyin popularity ranks 3rd overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, continuously boosting attention; Clinical Medicine (A), Basic Medicine (A), Stomatology (A), Pharmacy (A+), Nursing (A+), etc., are all at the national top level, highly matching the enrollment major Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD Program), with strong subject strength attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine major continues to be highly popular (2024, recommended), with high social recognition; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 30,672, slightly increased from 30,457 in 2025, with a small expansion of the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous advancing trend of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan, slight increase in provincial candidates, and the sustained high popularity of Clinical Medicine, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 10; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8, with a range of 5–11.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The university only enrolls for Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD Program) in Qinghai Province, with no tier selection options. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (5–11) can actively apply; those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<5) have a very high chance of admission; those with rankings near the lower limit (11) can try a risky application.
